Breakfast is included in the room rate. Lunch costs THB 1,200 per person per night. Dinner costs THB 1,800 per person per night. Children and Extra Bed Policy: Children of any age are allowed. 1 child (up to and including 2 years old) stays for free when using available cots. 1 child (from 3 years old to 11 years old) stays for THB 900 per child per night when using available extra beds. 1 person (12 years old and over) stays for THB 1,800 per person per night when using available extra beds. The maximum number of extra beds is 1. The maximum number of cots is 1. The maximum number of guests is 3. Deposit Policy: The guest will be charged a prepayment of the total price of the reservation at any time. Cancellation Policy: The guest can cancel free of charge until 1 day before arrival. The guest will be charged the total price of the reservation if they cancel within 1 day before arrival.

PAID (PG) RB/2A THB 2,318.40+++ (21-24/07) + THB 2,376.36+++ (25/07) per night -15% comm kickback THB 1,747.50 net -FOC 1 infant, 22-month-old daughter -Hi there, we’re really looking forward to staying with you from 21–26 July! It’s our babymoon before our family grows a little more. We’re expecting twin girls and will also be travelling with our 22-month-old daughter. I just thought I’d ask if there was any chance of a complimentary room upgrade if one happened to be available. We completely understand if not, but the extra space would be amazing for our growing family. Thanks so much, and we can’t wait to stay with you! **Book between 1–7 July 2026 and enjoy exclusive benefits. Reserve our Best Flexible, Advance Purchase, or Stay Longer Member Rates for stays until 30 September 2026 and receive: -A complimentary upgrade from a Deluxe Room to Deluxe Corner Room (subject to availability) -Kids Stay & Eat Free for children up to 12 years old on the same meal plan as their parents (applicable to all room types) ABOUT YOUR BOOK DIRECT BENEFITS: ** FO pls deduct cost to transaction #81108 ** Stay of 5 nights and more* • Receive THB 1,000 resort credit per stay* • Comp

Guest Name - Alexander Bennett Special Occasion - Yes If Yes, please specify the occasion - Babymoon Date of the Occasion - Date of Occasion - 2026-07-21 Birthday - Date of Birth - 2024-08-24 Activities - Painting Activities - Kids Cooking Classes Activities - Paper Crafts Activities - Gardening Activities - Tie Dye Would you like transportation from the hotel? - No Would you like transportation from the hotel? - No Pillow Preference - Non-Allergic pillow Please remove all alcoholic beverages from the minibar - No Activities - Fitness Activities - Explore Takua Pa Old Town

**ONLINE CHECK-IN** Dear Avani+ Khao Lak Team, I hope you’re doing well. My family and I are looking forward to staying with you in a few days, and we can’t wait to experience your beautiful resort. This trip is especially meaningful to us as it’s our baby moon before we welcome twin girls later this year. We’ll also be travelling with our toddler, so we’re really looking forward to a relaxing few days together as a family before life gets a little busier. If there happens to be any possibility of a complimentary room upgrade, we would be incredibly grateful. We completely understand that upgrades are subject to availability, and we appreciate your consideration. Thank you so much for taking the time to read our message. We are very excited to stay with you and experience the wonderful hospitality that Avani is known for. Warm regards, Alexander Bennett
RB3A
